name: Roasted Chickpeas
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked chickpeas, drained well and blotted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 200 degrees C (400 F).
2. Mix the spices with the chickpeas in a bag and shake well.
3. Spread the chickpeas onto a non-stick baking sheet in one layer.
4. Bake for about an hour, or until crunchy.
5. Cool and store in an airtight container.
Note: No oil is used in this recipe. You can use canned chickpeas instead, just wash and drain them first. Experiment with different spices to create your own tasty combinations.
